Taxonomy_x: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Cnidaria; Anthozoa; Hexacorallia; Zoantharia; Sphenopidae; Palythoa
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Metazoa; Cnidaria; Anthozoa; Hexacorallia; Zoantharia; Sphenopidae; Palythoa
Assembly: The assembly jaPalCari2.1 is based on 98x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Aquatic Symbiosis Genomics Project (https://www.aquaticsymbiosisgenomics.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. A large number of centromeric repeats is in the unlocalised sequences.

Taxonomy_x: Eukaryota; Viridiplantae; Streptophyta; Embryophyta; Tracheophyta; Spermatophyta; Magnoliopsida; eudicotyledons; Gunneridae; Pentapetalae; Saxifragales; Crassulaceae; Sedum
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Viridiplantae; Streptophyta; Embryophyta; Tracheophyta; Spermatophyta; Magnoliopsida; eudicotyledons; Gunneridae; Pentapetalae; Saxifragales; Crassulaceae; Sedum
Assembly: The assembly drSedAcre1.hap2.1 is based on 47x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. The genome was observed to be likely autotetraploid. The primary submission contains one copy of each of the chromosomes.
